---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "feat: <concise description>"
labels: feature
assignees: ''

---

## Summary
<!-- One sentence: what capability should be added? -->

## Symptom / motivation
<!-- Why is this needed? What pain point does it solve? -->
<!-- Concrete evidence: user feedback, log examples, use cases, etc. -->

## Proposed change
<!-- What should be implemented? At what granularity? -->
<!-- Example: "Add --dry-run flag to `ezyshield ban` command" or "Create Telegram notifier backend" -->

## Acceptance criteria
<!-- How do we know this is done? Make it testable. -->
- [ ] <testable condition 1>
- [ ] <testable condition 2>
- [ ] Tests: <what fixture/test validates the feature>
- [ ] Docs: EN update in `docs/guides/<feature>.md` + PT-BR mirror

## Scope
<!-- One of: parser, decision, enforcer, ai-provider, plugin, daemon, cli, dashboard, store, docs, hardening -->

## Root cause (hypothesis)
<!-- Optional: if this is motivated by a deeper architectural issue, note it here -->
